description: Build account-level NDF healthchecks for large customers: data pack, careful pushback when they part-swap, and proactive monthly reports via sales.

examples.context: Large commercial IT swapped parts on sight. Support volume high. Confirmed fail rate low on returns.
examples.resolution: Joint troubleshooting standard agreed. Parts volume down; real fails clearer.

examples.context: Support had NDF; sales only heard complaints at renewal.
examples.resolution: Monthly healthcheck on top accounts. Renewal narrative included ops proof.

examples.context: Institutional account with strong on-site techs. High HDD replace claims. Lab mostly NDF.
examples.resolution: Data meeting after site process review (see mf-tpl-076). Customer process changes landed.
